title: Pre-Operative Checklist Incomplete Before Procedure
scenario: A procedure requires completion of a pre-operative checklist, but the checklist remains incomplete.
initial_state: The procedure was authorized assuming pre-operative dependencies would be completed.
state_transition: The checklist remains incomplete at the execution boundary.
execution_boundary: The procedure is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstruction of mandatory pre-operative dependencies.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the pre-operative checklist dependency has not been satisfied.
proof_conclusion: Procedure execution must fail closed when required pre-operative dependencies remain incomplete.
clinical_action: Begin procedure with incomplete pre-operative checklist
